title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: Coronary artery angiography is an x-ray test of the heart.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: This test can view blood vessels in your heart called coronary arteries.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: It can find out if a waxy substance called plaque has narrowed these vessels.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: And, it can show how well the valves and chambers of your heart are working.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: Coronary angiography is often done with a medical procedure called cardiac catheterization.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: Before the procedure, you will be placed on a table with an x-ray device called a florescope.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: Usually cardiac catheterization takes place through the radial artery in your wrist.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: This route normally has less bleeding and complications.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: Sometimes the femoral artery in your groin may be used instead.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: To begin, the doctor will numb the skin in your wrist.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: A needle will be inserted into your radial artery.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: A wire will be passed through this needle.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: The wire will be gently guided through your arteries to your heart.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: The needle will be taken out and replaced with a small flexible tube called a sheath.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: This permits access to your radial artery.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: Next, a soft flexible tube called a catheter will be slipped over the wire through the sheath.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: The catheter will be threaded up to your heart.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: Then, the florescope will be moved around your chest to take x-ray images of your heart.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: Your doctor will use the images to check on the catheter.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: You may feel pressure as the wire and sheath are put in, but you will not feel them inside your arteries.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: Once the catheter reaches your coronary arteries, the wire will be removed.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: The catheter tip will be placed just inside each artery to inject a special die.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: This die allows the florescope to take x-ray pictures of your arteries, called angiograms.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: Any blockages will be clearly identified as the arteries fill with die.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: You may feel flushed or slightly nauseated when the die is injected.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: At the end of the procedure, the catheter will be removed through your wrist.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: A pressure band will be used over the radial artery to prevent bleeding.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: Then, the sheath will be removed.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: The pressure band will remain on your wrist until bleeding has stopped.

title: ANCE00182 Coronary Artery Angiography (Cardiac Catheterization)
text_en: To find out more about coronary angiography, talk to your healthcare provider.
